reason: The Fugitive – everyman doctor hunted after witnessing a crime he didn’t commit
Copycat – psychologist caught in a deadly game after spotting killer’s pattern
The Net – one wrong download and an ordinary woman is framed by unseen forces
The Firm – young lawyer uncovers a murder plot and can’t turn back
Speed – innocent bus passenger fights against deadly game of high-speed terror
Crimson Tide – naval officer wrong time when nuclear crisis erupts on sub
Fallen – cop’s life spirals as evil spirit inhabits bodies at crime scenes
U Turn – chance wrong turn throws everyman into corrupt small-town nightmare
Mute Witness – silent makeup artist stumbles on filmed murder, suddenly hunted
The Frighteners – paranormal investigator forced to face a menacing unseen threat
